content:
# Complex Refractive Index Method

**Summary**: A model relating the conductivity of a porous medium to its saturation, matrix, and pore fluid properties.

---

## How It Appears in the Thesis Collection

- [[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]] used the CRIM model to relate sand conductivity to its saturation.

## Scientific Context

- [[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]] Used to link petrophysical properties with geophysical measurements.

## Measurement and Characterization Methods

- [[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024]] Analytical calculation using conductivity and mineralogy data.

## Key Findings Across Sources

- The CRIM equation was used to calculate Sw from measured conductivity (C). ([[2024-tarchi|Tarchi, 2024, p. 25]])
